# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

add_subdirectory(describe)
add_subdirectory(unittests)

add_library(library-cpp-controller)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-controller PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-controller PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  cpp-containers-concurrent_hash_set
  library-cpp-getopt
  cpp-yson-node
  cpp-yt-memory
  yt-yt-core
  cpp-pipeline_helpers-flow_execute
  library-cpp-common
  cpp-controller-describe
  library-cpp-distributed_throttler
  library-cpp-misc
  library-cpp-tables
  library-cpp-client
  yt-library-cypress_election
  yt-library-lock_election
  yt-library-orchid
  library-profiling-solomon
  library-query-engine_api
)

target_sources(library-cpp-controller PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/config.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/controller_service.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/controller.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/flow_executor.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_balancer.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_balancer_common.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_balancer_greedy.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_balancer_resource_queue.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_balancer_result.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/job_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/lease_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/persisted_state_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/state_access.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/state_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/throttler_host.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/controller/worker_tracker_service.cpp
